title: Crispy Duck Leg Confit
description: A classic argentinian dish combining the tender confit duck leg with the crunchy xtra crispy skin. This recipe is a must-try for any poultry lover.

ingredients.name: Confit spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

ingredients.name: Crispy seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Season the duck legs with confit spice blend, garlic, and herbs de provence.
Heat the xtra virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck legs until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the duck legs to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the meat is tender and the skin is crispy.
While the duck legs are baking, mix together the crispy seasoning blend and a pinch of salt.
Remove the duck legs from the oven and sprinkle the crispy seasoning blend mixture evenly over the top of each leg.
Return the duck legs to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the crispy topping is golden brown.
Serve the crispy duck leg confit hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
